Select a performance to view seats on Broadway Direct, our official ticket source."},{"url":"https://www.wickedtour.net/","title":"Wicked Tour 2026: Tickets, Venues, Cast","content":"Following an absolutely successful run on Broadway, the musical is set to embark on a National Wicked tour 2026.
Don’t miss your chance to catch this iconic musical on tour in 2026 – buy Wicked tickets now!
The Wicked Tour 2026 is an exciting traveling production of the immensely popular Broadway musical “Wicked.” Known for its captivating story, enchanting music, and stunning stage effects, Wicked has been delighting audiences around the world since its premiere in 2003.
The Wicked National tour 2026 allows theater enthusiasts across different cities to experience the magic and spectacle of this beloved show.
The tour features a talented cast of performers who bring the iconic characters of Elphaba, the Wicked Witch of the West, and Glinda, the Good Witch, to life.
And now, in 2026 tours, they still captivate audience with their dynamic portrayals.
The Wicked National Tour 2026 boasts an exceptional cast.
Of course, the heart of Wicked lies in its unforgettable music and lyrics by Stephen Schwartz.
The Wicked UK Tour 2026 brings the enchanting world of the Broadway musical to cities across the United Kingdom.
Whether you’re a devoted fan or new to the story, the Wicked UK Tour 2026 promises a spellbinding journey filled with friendship, acceptance, and the enduring power of storytelling.
You can purchase them directly from the official website – wickedtour.net, or through authorized ticket vendors.
